Appearances:
Plaintiff 41 Tehama L.P. is present. Represented by Xavier Garza.
Attorney Daniel Riley for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ananya Pattanayak is present.
Attorney Christina Schreiver appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of Jun-25-2018 is vacated. (501)
